nodes.label: AI as speed tool for discrete tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable oracle requiring deep trust
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a massive speed-boost for a lot of things

nodes.label: AI code quality and reliability
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for obscure or unfamiliar languages
nodes.grounding_span: If I'm using Claude 4 or Gemini 2.5 Pro to write code, I can almost certainly trust that it's writing 'good code'

nodes.label: AI bug severity and fix effort
nodes.label_negative: AI as ineffective when given wrong files or insufficient context
nodes.grounding_span: There's actually a really high success rate at bug-finding when using this method

nodes.label: AI as job threat
nodes.label_negative: AI as benign tool that creates new opportunities
nodes.grounding_span: our jobs are going to be fully supplanted by artificially intelligent agents

nodes.label: Authenticity of AI-generated content
nodes.label_negative: AI as acceptable substitute for human interaction
nodes.grounding_span: I don't trust AI when it comes to communicating with other humans on my behalf

nodes.label: AI as verification-requiring tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous decision-maker without oversight

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: create more efficient workflows and better end-products

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: AI was wrong and that feature never existed in that program

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: human-to-human connection that needs to persist

nodes.label: Faith and trust in divine control
nodes.grounding_span: I have faith in my Lord Jesus Christ and I know that at the end of the day, He's in charge of it all

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for code generation
nodes.grounding_span: It was astounding to watch and it just spit out like 60 lines of code within ten seconds that did exactly what I needed

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for software guidance
nodes.grounding_span: I spend the entire day listening to AI and trying to do what it says, only to discover that AI was wrong

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing jobs
nodes.grounding_span: There is little tension left within me -- only resignation

nodes.label: Peaceful trust in divine sovereignty amid disruption
nodes.grounding_span: I'm okay with that because I have faith in my Lord Jesus Christ

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
Systematic iterative decomposition of tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Each step in that process is probably more granular than it needs to be

nodes.label: Pragmatic calibration based on task stakes and verifiability
nodes.grounding_span: the stakes aren't super high on this because we don't trust it as 'Gospel truth'
